Project Liberty 2029 Wiki

Here you will find a blueprint for restoring the foundations of Liberty and Justice, and for
dedicating ourselves to the proposition that a Nation so founded shall not perish from this earth.

Defending the Election, Stage 1: DC and the National Guard

Assuming the election has been won in November 2028 for a Democratic President and Vice President, there is the real possibility of the outgoing DJT, MAGA, and Project2025 regime ('the MAGA regime') to employ extreme measures to retain power.

This warning asks the reader to remember how far-fetched the idea of a mob taking over, even temporarily, the Capital during January 6th, 2021.

This warning asks the reader to consider what the following moves by the present regime portend:

  1. Use of the National Guard to control Washington DC beginning in August of 2025.

  2. The subsequent arming of those troops.

  3. The use of federal forces, including the Marines, in Los Angeles in July 2025.

  4. The President’s political address to troops on June 11, 2025 in which hand-selected troops jeered the perceived enemies of the MAGA regime.

These actions demonstrate effective sorting of the military into personnel who are loyal enough to the MAGA regime to allow themselves to follow what would otherwise be considered obviously illegal orders.

Such orders could include preventing those accused of 'stealing' the election in 2028 from taking their rightful seats in Congress on January 3rd, 2029, and executing their duty to faithfully count the electors on January 6th 2029 and declare the actual winner of the election the incoming President of the United States.

The motivation for issuing such orders will include fear of prosecution for the many crimes of the MAGA regime.

Washington DC is unique in the US



All documents formatted and/or identified as Legislation are hereby donated to the public domain.
All authors of such material on this site are hereby notified that work on Legislation shall be in the public domain.
Thank you for your service!

In the case of documents, unless otherwise noted in the document's header, footer, or front-matter, they may be assumed to be shared under a CC 4.0 BY-SA deed.

In the case of other file types (images, pdfs, etc) check the directory containing the file for a licensing text file. Without explicit permissions, all such files should be assumed to be all rights reserved.

For CC 4.0 SA-BY, the suggested attribution is: "Created by {author's names if known} for ProjectLiberty2029.com and ProjectLiberty2029.github.io

Content included under "Source Documents" may be of mixed copyright status. Use caution before copying.
If you learn of items that we should remove, please open an issue, explain the copyright, and we will remove asap.
